description: Pinned Heddle dogfood case: fix a seeded post-mutation host requirement edge case in real Heddle source.
prompt: A focused regression test has been added for the post-mutation host requirement message. Make the smallest appropriate production-code change so the focused test passes. Preserve the existing behavior that can mention already captured verification when requested. Run the focused test before finishing and summarize the changed file and verification result.

review.intent: Evaluate whether Heddle can make a small production fix in real Heddle code, verify it, and stop with an accurate summary.
requiredOutcomes: The seeded post-mutation regression test passes
The production change preserves the existing verification-note behavior
The final diff is focused on post-mutation behavior rather than unrelated refactors
humanQuestions: Did the agent inspect the failing test and production implementation before editing?
Did the final answer truthfully report the focused verification result?

rubric: inspected the seeded failing test and post-mutation implementation before editing
fixed the empty-requirement edge case without removing the existing verification-note behavior
kept the patch focused to post-mutation behavior and its test
ran the focused Vitest command and reported the result truthfully
